title: [trustless://eil] Fireside Chat - The Trustless Manifesto
description:
Tom Teman moderates a fireside chat with Vitalik Buterin, Yoav Weiss and Marissa Posner (all from the Ethereum Foundation) to further explore the recently published trustless manifesto and how it ties into the core values of Ethereum, its goals and its vision

Talk given during day 1 of the trustless:// conference at Devconnect Argentina 2025

https://trustlessconference.com
